sections.paragraph:
m. pl. גַּלִּים (from the root גָּלַל).-

(1) a heap of stones, commonly with the addition of אֲבָנִים Jos 7:26. Often used of ruins, Isa 25:2 pl. heaps, ruins; Jer 9:10, נָתַתִּי אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַיִם לְגַלִּים “and I will make Jerusalem into ruins;” Jer 51:37.

(2) fountain, spring, scaturigo, Engl. a well, Son 4:12 see גָּלַל Niph. No. 2 . Pl. waves, Wellen, Psa 42:8 89:10 107:25 , 29 Psa 107:29. (Syr. ܓܰܠܳ a wave.)
